mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_mentor_board.nextVal FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO UB_MENTOR_BOARD(mentorBoard_number, board_title, board_content, member_number) VALUES(#{mentorBoardNumber}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{memberNumber})
mapper.select: SELECT m.member_number, m.member_id, b.mentorBoard_number, b.board_title, b.board_content, b.board_date, b.board_click FROM UB_MEMBER m JOIN UB_MENTOR_BOARD b ON b.member_number = m.member_number WHERE b.mentorBoard_number = #{mentorBoardNumber}
